title: Gate check history and flat output
description:
Make gate inspection the single surface for the latest run, prior-run history, and unwrapped report text.

## Background

`gate check` and `gate check-all` are the existing inspection variants (cli.rs:971-981) but expose only the latest run with no history and no flat output. `GateRunResult` already stores full stdout/stderr (types.rs:1072,1074) and `list_gate_runs_for_issue` (storage/mod.rs:230) already lists prior runs, so history and flat output reuse stored data rather than a new command.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-08: gate check returns the latest run by default, lists prior runs via a history flag filterable by gate and by status, and offers a flat unwrapped report-text view, with both gate check and gate check-all retained.

## Notes

Touch the Check/CheckAll variants and handlers in cli.rs, reusing `list_gate_runs_for_issue` (storage/mod.rs:230) and the stored stdout/stderr (types.rs:1072,1074). Add latest-by-default, a history flag filterable by gate and status, and flat unwrapped report views; retain both `gate check` and `gate check-all`. Document the new flags.
